tooltips.installed_fonts: Shows fonts across all clients. Each entry displays the font name and count of installations.
tooltips.copy_protected: Shows copy protected fonts. Red indicates copy protected, green not protected.
tooltips.duplicate: Shows duplicate fonts. Each entry displays the font name and count.
tooltips.type_enabled: Shows typeface enabled status. Red indicates disabled, green enabled.
tooltips.valid: Shows font validity. Red indicates invalid, green valid.
tooltips.vendor: Shows font vendors. Each entry displays the vendor name and count.
tooltips.type: Shows font types. Each entry displays the type name and count.
